Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees.
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello join forces to create New England eats with a New Orleans twist.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics.
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Cheese Fondue, Fondue Bourguignonne, Chocolate Fondue
Video.title: Fondue

Video.summary: Great Grains: Barley Lemon Water, Barley and Wild Mushroom Salad
Video.title: Great Grains

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Anthony's Firecracker Shrimp, Shrimp Soup
Video.title: Shrimp

Video.summary: Deviled Crab, Oysters Mosca
Video.title: More Louisiana Specials

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces.
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: Basic Pilaf, Vegetable Pilaf, Pilaf with Chicken Livers and Pecans
Video.title: Pilaf

Video.summary: Sunday Dinners: Salad with Honey Mustard Dressing, Sunday Pork Roast
Video.title: Sunday Dinners

Video.summary: Red Red Wine: Garlic and Rosemary Red Wine Vinegar, Coq au Vin
Video.title: Red Red Wine

Video.summary: Hearty Soups: Butternut Squash and Sausage Soup, Potato Onion Soup
Video.title: Hearty Soups

Video.summary: Skate Wings, Monkfish Bouillon, Chilled Mousse of Pike, Cornmeal Lemon Fish
Video.title: Uncommon Fish

Video.summary: Emeril makes Louisiana Bourbon the star ingredient in three recipes.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: Emeril is on a mission to bring back squab to the grill and to your plate!
Video.title: Bringing Back Squab

Video.summary: Emeril extols the benefits of grass-fed beef, then presents three recipes.
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates the flavorful Creole tomato, grown from rich soil of the Mississippi Delta.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: For your next get together, do it New Orleans-style with Emeril's traditional crawfish boil.
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Andouille is not just Jambalaya; try it in one of Emeril's show-stopping recipes.
Video.title: Andouille Sausage 101

Video.summary: Forget what you know about okra: Emeril makes okra outrageously good.
Video.title: Best Okra in Town

Video.summary: Detroit Lions superfan Michael Banks and his wife, Rona, turn to grilled Tailgating fare.
Video.title: Detroit

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Cali-style carne asada burritos, crowd-pleasing chicken, and green chile nachos.
Video.title: Los Angeles Rams

Video.summary: Winter Squash Chowder, Butternut Squash Spaetzle
Video.title: Squash

Video.summary: Ragout of Chanterelles with Route, Smoked Mushrooms with Tasso over Angel Hair Pasta
Video.title: Mushrooms

Video.summary: Barbecue Turkey, Grilled Prawns with Caviar
Video.title: Grill Show

Video.summary: Classically Seasoned Confit, Rilly Rillette, Pasta with Confit
Video.title: Confit

Video.title: Pheasant and Squab

Video.title: Crawfish

Video.summary: Artichoke Preparation, Redfish Marcelle with Artichoke and Mushroom Sauce, Artichoke and Shrimp Salad

Video.title: Baltimore Ravens
